scripts.mcpb:stage: cp -r dist .mcpb-build/extension/server && cp package.json .mcpb-build/extension/ && cp package-lock.json .mcpb-build/extension/ 2>/dev/null || true && cd .mcpb-build/extension && npm install --omit=dev && cd ../../ && cp README.md .mcpb-build/extension/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp LICENSE .mcpb-build/extension/
scripts.mcpb:pack: npx mcpb validate .mcpb-build/extension && npx mcpb pack .mcpb-build/extension tududi.mcpb
scripts.mcpb:verify: npx mcpb unpack tududi.mcpb .mcpb-verify && test -f .mcpb-verify/manifest.json && test -d .mcpb-verify/server && rm -rf .mcpb-verify
scripts.mcpb:build: npm run build && npm run mcpb:prep && npm run mcpb:stage && npm run mcpb:manifest && npm run mcpb:pack && npm run mcpb:verify
